text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The more she trains and the more she races, the
heavier the sense of unease inside Sakura
Chiyono O seems to grow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She starts wondering if her body—her very
being—is beginning to deteriorate...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she does any more running, she may be forced
to face up to the truth that her peak is behind
her. Fearing that possibility, she makes excuses to
avoid taking to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Maruzensky runs her first scrimmage
after a long hiatus, and wins it by seven lengths.
The media explodes with excitement at the return
of a legend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her role model working so hard to keep their
promise, Sakura Chiyono O can't afford to give
up either. She starts her summer camp training in
earnest.
